description_long: This cowshed is a rectangular, open-sided agricultural structure with a prominent gable roof clad in red metal panels. The roof is supported by sturdy wooden posts and beams, with concrete footings visible at the base of each post for stability. The gable ends are finished with horizontal wooden planks, giving a rustic yet functional appearance. The open design allows for maximum ventilation and easy access for livestock, while the high roof provides ample shelter from the elements. There are no visible doors or windows, emphasizing its utilitarian purpose. The overall construction suggests durability and practicality, suitable for housing cattle in a rural or peri-urban setting.
description: A rectangular, open-sided cowshed with a red gable metal roof, wooden support posts, and concrete footings. The structure is functional and rustic, designed for shelter and ventilation.
description_view_0: The gable end of the cowshed is visible, showing the triangular wooden planks and the peak of the red metal roof.
description_view_1: A side view of the cowshed highlights the full length of the red metal roof and the row of wooden support posts with concrete bases.
description_view_2: Another gable end view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the wooden planks and roof peak.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the red metal roof and supporting wooden posts clearly visible.
